_meta.description: Curated directory of major New York City agencies and the records they hold, used to route FOIL (Freedom of Information Law) requests. Every New York City agency receives FOIL requests through the central OpenRecords portal; that is the verified, canonical submission channel. Named records-access officers change frequently, so this directory does not hardcode officer emails. To confirm the current officer for any agency, consult the official FOIL Officers Directory.
_meta.statute: New York Freedom of Information Law (FOIL), Public Officers Law Article 6, Sections 84-90
_meta.note: Records descriptions reflect each agency's published jurisdiction. They are a routing aid, not an exhaustive list of holdings.

agencies.name: New York City Police Department
agencies.holds: Arrest reports, complaint (UF-61) reports, accident reports, body-worn camera footage, stop-question-and-frisk data, 911/radio run records, disciplinary and CCRB-related records, crime statistics (CompStat), policies, patrol guide, contracts

agencies.name: Fire Department of the City of New York
agencies.holds: Fire incident reports, EMS/ambulance call records, fire inspection records, response times, building fire safety violations, certificates of fitness, EMS billing, contracts

agencies.name: New York City Department of Correction
agencies.holds: Rikers Island and jail records, inmate incident reports, use-of-force reports, in-custody death records, staffing and overtime data, visitor logs, facility inspections, contracts

agencies.name: New York City Department of Education
agencies.holds: School enrollment and demographic data, school safety incident reports, budgets, contracts and vendor agreements, teacher and staff data, test scores, capital project records, busing contracts, special education records (de-identified)

agencies.name: New York City Department of Housing Preservation and Development
agencies.holds: Housing code violations, building registrations, affordable housing program records, lottery data, harassment findings, emergency repair records, complaint histories, contracts with developers

agencies.name: New York City Department of Buildings
agencies.holds: Building permits, construction filings, stop-work orders, complaints, inspection records, certificates of occupancy, violations, elevator and facade records, professional license records

agencies.name: New York City Department of Transportation
agencies.holds: Traffic crash and signal data, street and sidewalk repair records, bike lane and Vision Zero records, parking and metering contracts, ferry records, street design plans, capital projects

agencies.name: New York City Department of Sanitation
agencies.holds: Collection and recycling tonnage data, route records, snow removal records, enforcement and summons data, organics program records, fleet records, contracts

agencies.name: New York City Department of Health and Mental Hygiene
agencies.holds: Restaurant inspection records, disease surveillance and vital statistics (de-identified), lead and air quality data, mental health program records, rodent inspections, daycare inspections, contracts

agencies.name: New York City Human Resources Administration / Department of Social Services
agencies.holds: Public assistance and SNAP program data (aggregate/de-identified), shelter and homelessness program records, rental assistance, emergency food program records, contracts with providers

agencies.name: New York City Department of Homeless Services
agencies.holds: Shelter census and capacity data, shelter contracts, street homelessness outreach records, intake records (de-identified), shelter conditions and inspection records

agencies.name: New York City Administration for Children's Services
agencies.holds: Child welfare aggregate data, foster care and juvenile justice program records, daycare and child care program oversight records, fatality reviews (de-identified), contracts

agencies.name: New York City Department of Consumer and Worker Protection
agencies.holds: Business license records, consumer complaints, inspection and enforcement actions, fines, paid sick leave and fair workweek enforcement, debt collector records

agencies.name: New York City Department of City Planning
agencies.holds: Zoning records, land use applications (ULURP), demographic and PLUTO data, neighborhood study records, rezoning analyses, environmental review documents

agencies.name: New York City Department of Environmental Protection
agencies.holds: Water and sewer records, water quality testing, noise complaint records, air pollution enforcement, watershed and reservoir records, water billing, contracts

agencies.name: New York City Department of Parks and Recreation
agencies.holds: Park maintenance and capital project records, tree census and removal records, permit records, concession and contract records, playground and pool records, forestry records

agencies.name: New York City Taxi and Limousine Commission
agencies.holds: Taxi and for-hire vehicle trip data, driver and vehicle license records, medallion records, enforcement actions, fare and surcharge records, Uber/Lyft (high-volume for-hire) data

agencies.name: Office of the New York City Comptroller
agencies.holds: City contract registrations, audits, settlement and claims data (lawsuits against the City), pension fund records, prevailing wage enforcement, budget analyses, spending data

agencies.name: New York City Department of Investigation
agencies.holds: Investigation reports (closed), corruption and misconduct findings, policy recommendations, background investigation records, referrals

agencies.name: New York City Office of Management and Budget
agencies.holds: City budget documents, financial plans, agency spending allocations, headcount data, revenue projections

agencies.name: Office of the Mayor
agencies.holds: Mayoral correspondence, schedules and calendars, appointment records, executive orders, communications with agencies and outside parties, policy memos

agencies.name: New York City Department of Citywide Administrative Services
agencies.holds: City employee civil service records, hiring and exam data, city fleet records, city-owned real estate and leases, procurement, energy management records

agencies.name: New York City School Construction Authority
agencies.holds: School construction and capital project records, contracts, bids, project schedules, environmental records for school sites

agencies.name: New York City Housing Authority
agencies.holds: Public housing maintenance and repair records, lead and mold inspection records, capital project and contract records, development data, work order data (NYCHA has its own records-access process)

agencies.name: New York City Mayor's Office of Criminal Justice
agencies.holds: Criminal justice policy and program records, jail population planning (borough-based jails), supervised release and bail program contracts, reentry program records

agencies.name: New York City Business Integrity Commission
agencies.holds: Trade waste hauler licenses, wholesale market records, enforcement and background records for regulated industries

agencies.name: New York City Board of Elections
agencies.holds: Voter registration data, poll site records, election results and canvass records, ballot records, poll worker records. Note: the Board of Elections is a State-chartered body; it accepts FOIL requests directly rather than through OpenRecords.

agencies.name: New York City Economic Development Corporation
agencies.holds: Development project records, ground leases, subsidy and incentive agreements, RFPs and contracts, waterfront and industrial property records. Note: EDC is a local development corporation with its own FOIL process.
